envelope.style: CapCut/TikTok-native chunky sticker captions, meme POV format, paper-white + electric lilac, notch island always pure black
envelope.font: Bricolage Grotesque 800 (local woff2), Inter for UI rows

brief: POV meme teaser, vertical 9:16. Viewer is 'live on a call' — black notch island at top with pulsing orange mic dot; a green agent-done ping lands; tension beat (alt-tab? NOPE.); payoff: island expands into a mini agent-fleet dashboard ('one glance.'), then mic flips orange→red ('mute? one tap.'), end card wordmark + 'Free on GitHub'. Dominant motif: everything resolves AT the island — the island is the anchor the POV camera drifts around.
blueprints_rules: kinetic-beat-slam (caption slams on a shared beat grid, distinct entrances)
spring-pop-entrance (dashboard rows + badge, fromTo scale pop, staggered <=500ms)
cursor-click-ripple (ripple ring envelope on the green ping / mute tap)
multi-phase-camera (continuous micro-drift zoom anchored on the island for POV feel)

scenes.motion: slam + shake; orange mic dot pulse; world drift zoom (origin = island)
green dot ping + double ripple; sticker rotates in
nervous jitter; red stamp scale-slam + frame shake
island expands downward into fleet dashboard; rows pop staggered
mic dot orange→red flip + screen flash + lilac underline sweep
wordmark slam, word-reveal tagline, lilac pill pop, seeded confetti settle
